stemHtml:
Given the following information for a Commercial Air Transport flight, what action should be taken by the commander?

Take-Off Fuel: 3300 lb 
Trip Fuel: 1800 lb 
Alternate 1 Fuel: 800 lb 
Alternate 2 Fuel: 500 lb 
Final Reserve Fuel: 600 lb 
Total Distance to Destination: 800 NM 
Remaining Fuel after 400 NM: 2300 lb

options.a: Declare an emergency as the remaining fuel is less than the Final Reserve Fuel at Alternate 1.
options.b: Continue the flight; in case of diversion proceed to Alternate 2.
options.c: the remaining fuel at Alternate 1 will be more than the Final Reserve Fuel.
options.d: Continue the flight; the remaining fuel at Alternate 1 will be more than the Final Reserve Fuel.
